    @allure.story("User can search, add to cart, and place order")
    def test_full_checkout_flow(page, signup):
        # 1. Initialize Pages
        checkout = CheckoutPage(page)
        login_pg = LoginPage(page)
    
        # Setup data - Dynamic email prevents registration conflicts

        email = f"e2e_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}@stream.com"

        signup.create_account("E2E User", email)
        signup.click_continue()
